title: Is it Possible to Export Monday.com Activity Logs to Power BI?
excerpt: Has anyone attempted to develop an API or devise a method for exporting Monday.com activity logs in bulk for subsequent importation into Power BI for analysis? If so, I would greatly appreciate it if you could share the …

posts.author: SMac (Sean Mac)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone attempted to develop an API or devise a method for exporting Monday.com activity logs in bulk for subsequent importation into Power BI for analysis? If so, I would greatly appreciate it if you could share the approach you took to achieve this. Thank you!
